_source: idea-engine control/outbox.md PROPOSAL 041 · 2026-07-13T18:01:18Z · status: sim-ready (the source of truth, @ idea-engine main 65dcf3ac3f89a8b5e7dd5f777b8ed54544d1a6e7, landed via idea-engine PR #331; idea doc ideas/fleet/spool-scale-go-no-go-margin-2026-07-13.md). Every constant below copied verbatim from the block. Committed BEFORE the runner (git-trail discipline). Fully hermetic: the runner reads ONLY this file.
units: integer grams throughout; all probabilities exact rationals

spool.note: true filament remaining F ~ uniform integer {0..1000} (a 1 kg spool)

scale.note: W = F + E + eps_s; eps_s ~ uniform integer {-5..+5} - the cited ±5 g practical resolution, the one constant in this model with a source, held fixed across regimes

estimate: Fhat = W - Ehat (may be negative; no clamping)

R-OWN.note: the Stage-2 habit - weighed it empty yourself, once; eps_t width INVENTED, pinned, disclosed; sensitivity pairs reporting-only

R-TABLE.tare: brand ~ uniform over the four seeds; Ehat = the seed; E = seed + delta
R-TABLE.note: the seeded brand table, unverified; delta width INVENTED, pinned, disclosed; sensitivity pairs reporting-only

R-GUESS.note: control - no tare knowledge; Ehat = 193 the 80-306 catalog midpoint

job.consumption: U = Jhat + ceil(Jhat*u/100) with u ~ uniform integer percent; integer ceiling pinned as ceil(a/b) = -(-a//b)
job.note: job mix and u INVENTED, pinned, disclosed; sensitivities reporting-only

drift_leg.note: reporting-only: W' = W + d, d ~ uniform integer {0..+8} - prices a skipped fresh tare after a warm hour; CANNOT flip the decision

decision_rule_tau_M: START the print iff Fhat >= Jhat + M

outcome_conventions.run_out: RUN-OUT iff started AND U > F (U = F exactly - finishing with zero grams spare - is NOT a run-out)

metrics: per (regime, M): RUNOUT = P(run-out | started) and FORGONE = P(declined | feasible), both exact fractions.Fraction in the decision arm; reporting per cell: start rate, feasible share, unconditional run-out

bands.feas_definition: Feas(R) = {M in the grid : RUNOUT(R, M) <= 1/100 AND FORGONE(R, M) <= 1/5}; M*(R) = min Feas(R) (undefined iff Feas(R) = empty)

arms.arm_a: DECISION arm - exact, seedless: enumerate (Jhat, u, tare-term, eps_s) with exact weights and count the F values in the implied integer intervals - closed-form exact rationals, platform-independent, no RNG. A convolution collapse (pre-summing eps_s - eps_t, or eps_s + delta, into one net-error pmf) is PERMITTED iff it reproduces the direct product enumeration EXACTLY (not within tolerance) on the pinned spot-check sub-grid. The ruling rides Arm A alone.

arm_s.rng: stdlib random.Random(seed), ONE generator per leg; all integer draws via rng.randrange (never randint), counted for the sentinels
arm_s.draw_order_pinned: regime by regime in the order R-OWN, R-TABLE, R-GUESS; per scenario: F -> tare term(s) -> eps_s -> job class -> Jhat -> u. Tare term(s): R-OWN = E then eps_t; R-TABLE = brand index then delta; R-GUESS = E. Drift sub-leg inserts d immediately after eps_s. A sensitivity lattice of width one ({0}) is still drawn (rng.randrange(0, 1)) to keep the scenario shape.
arm_s.class_draw_encoding: job class = rng.randrange(10): 0-4 small, 5-7 medium, 8-9 large (exactly the pinned 1/2 / 3/10 / 1/5 mix); large-heavy sensitivity mix = rng.randrange(4): 0 small, 1 medium, 2-3 large (exactly 1/4 / 1/4 / 1/2)
arm_s.common_random_numbers: one scenario set per regime, all eight M evaluated on it

agreement_gate.cells: every (regime, M) cell of the main confirmation leg
agreement_gate.on_breach: any breach invalidates the run - NULL axis (iii) arm disagreement, no ruling issues

seeds.registry_note: allocated strictly above the P040/VERDICT-051 high-water 20261300; new registry high-water 20261304; aux reserved for the named NULL probe, NEVER read by any decision number

stability_leg: seed 20261302, 20,000 scenarios per regime - the twin evaluators must reproduce the Arm-A ruling on it within the same gate

reporting_leg_seed_20261303.note: the drift and sensitivity Arm-S confirmations, 20,000 scenarios per (sub-leg, affected regime) cell, all drawn sequentially from the single seed-20261303 generator; reporting-only - CANNOT flip the decision

decision_rule_registered.order: evaluated IN THIS ORDER, REJECT FIRST; all band constants exact rationals; a main-leg agreement-gate breach invalidates the run before any ruling issues (NULL axis iii)
decision_rule_registered.reject: Feas(R-OWN) = empty - no swept margin gets the MEASURED-tare regime to <= 1/100 run-out without declining > 1/5 of feasible prints. Checked FIRST.
decision_rule_registered.approve: M*(R-OWN) <= 25 AND (Feas(R-TABLE) = empty OR M*(R-TABLE) >= M*(R-OWN) + 15). Both conjuncts on Arm-A exact numbers; the seed-20261302 stability leg must reproduce the ruling.
decision_rule_registered.null: anything else - a legitimate, reportable outcome with four pre-registered axes: (i) big-pocket, M*(R-OWN) in (25, 100]; (ii) table-parity, M*(R-TABLE) < M*(R-OWN) + 15 ('beats the seeded table, every time' overstated for go/no-go purposes at the pinned spreads); (iii) arm disagreement (the agreement gate fails - a model/implementation defect is the finding, no ruling issues); (iv) sensitivity straddle (a reporting-only sensitivity pair lands the primary conjuncts on opposite sides of a band edge - the named axis is the finding; reporting legs CANNOT flip the decision, they name the axis)
decision_rule_registered.null_probe_named: on the real bench: weigh ONE spool ten times with a fresh tare each time (pins eps_s), and weigh three empty spools of one brand (pins delta) - zero new tooling, the lane's own try-it loop

hand_fixture_six_scenarios.columns: (F, E, Ehat, eps_s, Jhat, u, M) -> (W, Fhat, U, started, run_out, feasible, forgone)

scenarios.discrepancy_note: the idea doc's trailing tag for this scenario reads 'feasible'; under the PROPOSAL 041 block's own pinned convention (FEASIBLE iff F >= U) F = 100 < U = 103 is INFEASIBLE - a started run-out is definitionally infeasible (run-out = started AND U > F). The pinned convention in the outbox block (the source of truth) wins; disclosed in REPORT.md.

zero_error_identity_leg: Arm A, exact: with eps_s = eps_t = delta = u = 0 and Ehat = E, RUNOUT(R, M) = 0 for every regime and every M >= 0, and FORGONE(R, 0) = 0 - exact zeros, not tolerances
monotonicity_gate: exact, both arms: RUNOUT non-increasing and FORGONE non-decreasing in M within every regime - a theorem under shared enumeration/common random numbers, so any violation is an implementation defect: hard gate

r_guess_control_expectation.expectation: M*(R-GUESS) is expected to be much larger than M*(R-TABLE) or absent - the measured content of the docs' 'guessing is useless'
r_guess_control_expectation.operationalized_surprise: surprise iff Feas(R-GUESS) is non-empty AND NOT (Feas(R-TABLE) non-empty AND M*(R-GUESS) >= M*(R-TABLE) + 15); a surprise is printed as a first-class anomaly line, never silently absorbed (reporting-only)

sensitivity_straddle_check: for each reporting-only variant (eps_t pair, delta pair, u pair, job mix, drift), recompute the three primary conjunct booleans on Arm-A exact numbers - REJECT conjunct Feas(R-OWN) = empty; pocket conjunct M*(R-OWN) <= 25; habit conjunct Feas(R-TABLE) = empty OR M*(R-TABLE) >= M*(R-OWN) + 15 (a variant touching only one regime pairs with the baseline tables of the other) - a variant flipping any primary conjunct relative to baseline is a straddle: it NAMES the axis, it never flips the decision

harvested_doc_lines_verbatim.pin: menno420/curious-research @ a9fd5faa6a10b4d1364d205dbeac7a8678e1bd73 (citation only - the runner reads nothing outside this file)

line_1.text: **±5 g resolution on a 5 kg cell.** "Roughly half a spool left" is trustworthy. "Exactly enough to finish this print" is not — leave yourself margin.

line_2.text: **Your own measured empty weight beats the seeded table, every time.**

boundaries.invented_widths: eps_t, delta, u, and the job mix carry NO bench datapoint anywhere in the fleet (the source repo's own sketch has never compiled), so the sweeps bracket scale not shape; the named live probe measures eps_s and delta directly
boundaries.independence: a shared calibration-gain bias would partially cancel in Fhat = W - Ehat under R-OWN, making the real measured-tare regime BETTER than modeled - independence is conservative against APPROVE's habit-pays conjunct
boundaries.pinned_world: 1 kg spools, uniform F; 250 g / 2.3 kg spools and clustered shelves are named out of registered scope
